properties.summary: An exceptionally large, double-fronted end-of-terrace house, offering generous living space, is situated on a quiet residential street in the heart of Camden Town, NW1. This prime location places you just moments away from a wide range of shopping and transport facilities.
Mid terrace block consisting of 8 residential units arranged over lower ground, ground and 2 x upper floors.

properties.address: Gaisford Street, Kentish Town, London, NW5

A beautiful terraced town house built in the 1990's with bags of character throughout. The property has five bedrooms, four bathrooms, a south facing ground floor patio garden.

A charming Victorian four double bedroom semi-detached freehold house with a private garden, situated on one of Kentish Town's most sought after tree-lined roads.

Spacious 2083 sq ft. family home in a gated development with parking, balcony and a communal garden. Close to schools, Caledonian Park and Parliament Hill / Hampstead Heath recreational areas. Grocery shops, cafés and stations, including Kentish Town (0.5 mi) are within walking distance
This fantastic mews house offers generous living space across two floors with four double bedrooms and a private garden.

A four-bedroom house ideally located between Tufnell Park and Kentish Town. The property features two spacious reception rooms, a private garden, a family bathroom, and an en-suite to the principal bedroom and bedroom two. Offered with no onward chain.
